scripts.build:crawler: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler build
scripts.build:mcp: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-mcp build
scripts.build: npm run build:crawler && npm run build:mcp
scripts.login: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler login
scripts.init:crawler:login: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler login
scripts.init:crawler:sections: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:sections
scripts.init:crawler:boards: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:boards
scripts.init:crawler:threads: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:threads --
scripts.init:crawler:threads:full: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:threads -- --with-plain
scripts.init:crawler: npm run init:crawler:sections && npm run init:crawler:boards
scripts.init:sections: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:sections
scripts.init:boards: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:boards
scripts.init:threads: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler init:threads --
scripts.crawl:thread: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler crawl:thread --
scripts.db:check: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-crawler db:check
scripts.dev:mcp: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-mcp dev
scripts.test: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-mcp test
scripts.lint: node scripts/run.mjs npm run -w bbs-mcp lint:tsc
